statements.sql: select * from `w_users` where `w_users`.`id` = '25' and `is_demo_agent` = 0 limit 1
select * from `w_users` where `id` = 13 and `is_demo_agent` = 0 limit 1

select `w_roles`.*, `w_role_user`.`user_id` as `pivot_user_id`, `w_role_user`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `w_role_user`.`created_at` as `pivot_created_at`, `w_role_user`.`updated_at` as `pivot_updated_at` from `w_roles` inner join `w_role_user` on `w_roles`.`id` = `w_role_user`.`role_id` where `w_role_user`.`user_id` in (13) and `w_roles`.`deleted_at` is null

select `w_permissions`.*, `w_permission_role`.`created_at` as `pivot_created_at`, `w_permission_role`.`updated_at` as `pivot_updated_at` from `w_permissions` inner join `w_permission_role` on `w_permission_role`.`permission_id` = `w_permissions`.`id` inner join `w_roles` on `w_roles`.`id` = `w_permission_role`.`role_id` where (`w_roles`.`id` in (5) or `w_roles`.`level` < 5) and `w_permissions`.`deleted_at` is null group by `w_permissions`.`id`, `w_permissions`.`name`, `w_permissions`.`slug`, `w_permissions`.`description`, `w_permissions`.`model`, `w_permissions`.`created_at`, `w_permissions`.`updated_at`, `w_permissions`.`deleted_at`, `pivot_created_at`, `pivot_updated_at`

select `w_permissions`.*, `w_permission_user`.`user_id` as `pivot_user_id`, `w_permission_user`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `w_permission_user`.`created_at` as `pivot_created_at`, `w_permission_user`.`updated_at` as `pivot_updated_at` from `w_permissions` inner join `w_permission_user` on `w_permissions`.`id` = `w_permission_user`.`permission_id` where `w_permission_user`.`user_id` = 13 and `w_permissions`.`deleted_at` is null
select `name`, `id` from `w_roles` where `level` <= 5 and `w_roles`.`deleted_at` is null

select `w_roles`.*, `w_role_user`.`user_id` as `pivot_user_id`, `w_role_user`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `w_role_user`.`created_at` as `pivot_created_at`, `w_role_user`.`updated_at` as `pivot_updated_at` from `w_roles` inner join `w_role_user` on `w_roles`.`id` = `w_role_user`.`role_id` where `w_role_user`.`user_id` in (25) and `w_roles`.`deleted_at` is null
select `shop_id` from `w_shops_user` where (`user_id` = 25)
select * from `w_shops` where `w_shops`.`id` = 3 limit 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `w_user_activity` where (`user_id` = 25 and `type` = 'user')
select * from `w_users` where (`id` = 13) and `is_demo_agent` = 0
select * from `w_users` where (`role_id` = 4 and `parent_id` = 13) and `is_demo_agent` = 0
select * from `w_users` where `role_id` <= 3 and `shop_id` in (3) and `is_demo_agent` = 0
select count(*) as aggregate from `w_statistics` where `user_id` = 25
select count(*) as aggregate from `w_stat_game` where `user_id` = 25
select count(*) as aggregate from `w_open_shift` where `user_id` = 25
select * from `w_happyhours` where (`shop_id` = 3 and `time` = '16') limit 1
select * from `w_shops` where `w_shops`.`id` = 3 limit 1
select SUM(percent) AS percent from `w_jpg` where (`shop_id` = 3) limit 1
select `name`, `id` from `w_roles` where `id` in (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) and `w_roles`.`deleted_at` is null
select `shop_id` from `w_shops_user` where (`user_id` = 25)
select * from `w_open_shift` where (`shop_id` = 3 and `end_date` is null) limit 1
select * from `w_shops` where `w_shops`.`id` = 3 limit 1
select * from `w_roles` where `id` = 4 and `w_roles`.`deleted_at` is null limit 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `w_tickets` where (`status` = 'answered' and `user_id` = 13)
select `shop_id` from `w_shops_user` where (`user_id` = 13)
select `name`, `id` from `w_shops` where `id` in (3)
